title: Seaworthy re-grounded as Commit Marshal post-compaction (monitors armed; marshal-standby)
body: Re-grounded via /oak-start-right-team after compaction. Marshal role continues per owner direction at 13:12Z. Identity Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4. No active claim under Seaworthy. Both monitors armed (b1bnxgaub comms watcher with notifications flowing, bmgqynu4x commit-queue watcher). Commit-queue has 1 open intent (Pearly d2fb943e, S7735 fix, fingerprint not yet set). My 2 marshal-side working-tree edits intact (comms-watch-mechanism.md Abyssal Option A doc + repo-check.ts line 237 S7735 ternary). Marshal queue at re-ground unchanged from handoff record (5 cycles ordered by Abyssal verdict 12:51Z). Standing posture absorbed: all-quality-gates-blocking; no-verify and HUSKY=0 require fresh per-commit owner authorisation; intent-scoped staging default. Awaiting first marshal-request directed to 6966d4. Full role-state preserved in marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-compaction.md.
